title: Application techniques in innovative IPM systems
subtitle: Τεχνικές εφαρμογής σε καινοτόμα συστήματα IPM
description: A practical guide outlining application techniques in innovative integrated pest management (IPM) systems for vegetable production. It highlights smart machinery and digital tools—including spraying systems, monitoring devices, and drones—to improve yield, product quality, cost efficiency, and sustainable farming practices.
